name: @quent-examples/quent-pivot-table-panel
description: Grafana panel plugin that renders Quent operator statistics in a pivot table.

pnpm._comment_react: The @quent/* packages declare a React 19 peer dep (matching the main UI app), but Grafana 12 ships React 18 — so we relax the peer for this example. The plugin only consumes @quent/* via webpack-bundled source, where the externalized 'react' resolves to whatever Grafana provides at runtime; the React 18/19 hooks surface used by these components is identical.
pnpm._comment_overrides: The example is a nested pnpm workspace that re-references ../../packages/@quent/*. When pnpm resolves peer deps for those packages from this side, it can pick newer @tanstack/* versions than ui/'s root lockfile, which then *replaces* the symlinks under ui/packages/@quent/*/node_modules/@tanstack/* and breaks the main ui/'s typecheck (two different copies of the same class). Pinning these to ui/ root's lockfile versions keeps both workspaces consistent.
